layouts.contract: Sparse cover with top-left nav, tiny metadata, and a compact central promise.
Scattered tags or proof stamps around one disciplined title block.
Narrative text on one side and one oversized number or ratio on the other.
Tight image grid with strict gutters, one local image slot, and short captions.
50:50 visual/text split with editorial labels and high whitespace.
Silhouette or abstract map with thin callout leaders and few labels.
Central vertical rule with alternating years and short evidence notes.
Dark reset slide with thin white network lines and labeled nodes.
Three columns anchored by huge step numbers and compact explanations.
Monochrome grid cells with text-only logo placeholders or approved marks.
Two blocks divided by a heavy rule, with action titles inside each side.
Large type equation with minimal arrows and one explanatory note.
Large black arrows with white labels and small footnotes.
Centered dark or light decision statement with owner, artifact, and deadline.
